questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with News Corp and/or NDS.

To what extent do you compete with News Corp in the supply of print media publication services? Name your key competing publications and describe their relative importance to your business. If possible, provide estimated market shares (by revenue).
Explain who you consider to be NDS’s main competitors in the supply of print media distribution services in the geographic areas where your print media is distributed.

Provide a brief description of the print media distribution services you acquire from NDS (including via any shared carriage arrangement with News Corp), including the estimated proportion of your business’s print media distribution spend that is spent on these entities.

Explain whether the print media distribution services you acquire from NDS have substitutes from alternative suppliers (including self-supply of distribution services). a. If so, please state who these alternative suppliers are and how they compare to NDS in terms of coverage, price and service quality. b. If you consider there are no effective substitutes from alternative suppliers, what would be the likely effect of loss of access to NDS’s print media distribution services on your business’s readership and associated revenue?
Explain whether your business self-supplies print media distribution services, and describe any barriers you face to commencing or increasing self-supply.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of distribution services for print media
questions.text: Describe the distribution services supplied by your business to print media publishers, including the geographic region(s) in Australia where you supply these services.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of distribution services for print media
questions.text: To what extent do you compete with NDS in the supply of distribution services to print media publishers? If possible, provide estimated market shares in each geographic region.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of distribution services for print media
questions.text: Provide a brief description of any distribution services you supply to News Corp for its print media, including the estimated proportion of your business’s revenue that is generated from supplying these services to News Corp.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of distribution services for print media
questions.text: Explain whether News Corp’s demand for your business’s distribution services could be effectively replaced with demand from alternative customers (including customers from industries outside of print media publishing). a. If so, please state who these alternative customers are. b. If you lost News Corp as a customer and couldn’t replace it with demand from other customers, what effect would this be likely to have on both your revenue and your costs?

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including any views or concerns on the effect of the Acquisition on competition in Australia.
